  • 方法详细资料

    • pushToTorna

      public static void pushToTorna(TornaApi tornaApi, ApiConfig apiConfig, com.thoughtworks.qdox.JavaProjectBuilder builder)
      Pushes documentation to the Torna API documentation platform.

      This method decides whether to push all or part of the documentation based on the settings in apiConfig. If the Torna API or the configuration information is missing, the method will return directly.

      参数:
      tornaApi - The API documentation object, containing information about all APIs.
      apiConfig - The configuration information for the API, including whether to push all documentation and other settings.
      builder - The Java project builder, used for constructing the project during the push process.

    • setDebugEnv

      public static boolean setDebugEnv(ApiConfig apiConfig, TornaApi tornaApi)
      Sets up the debugging environment.

      This method determines if a debugging environment exists based on the provided ApiConfig configuration, and sets up the debugging environment for TornaApi if it exists.

      参数:
      apiConfig - The API configuration, containing debugging environment name and URL information.
      tornaApi - The TornaApi instance to set the debugging environment for.
      返回:
      Returns true if a debugging environment exists; otherwise, returns false.

    • printDebugInfo

      public static void printDebugInfo(ApiConfig apiConfig, String responseMsg, Map<String,String> requestJson, String category)
      Prints debug information. This method is used to print configuration details, request specifics, and response information during debugging.
      参数:
      apiConfig - The API configuration object containing OpenUrl, appToken, etc.
      responseMsg - The response message, typically a JSON-formatted string.
      requestJson - The request JSON object in key-value pairs.
      category - The category of the request or response for classifying debug information.

    • printDebugInfo

      public static void printDebugInfo(ApiConfig apiConfig, String responseMsg, Map<String,String> requestJson, String category, boolean isPreRequest)
      Prints debug information with mode support.
      参数:
      apiConfig - The API configuration object containing OpenUrl, appToken, etc.
      responseMsg - The response message, null for pre-request mode.
      requestJson - The request JSON object in key-value pairs.
      category - The category of the request or response for classifying debug information.
      isPreRequest - true for pre-request mode, false for post-request mode.

    • buildApis

      public static List<Apis> buildApis(List<ApiMethodDoc> apiMethodDocs, boolean hasDebugEnv)
      build apis
      参数:
      apiMethodDocs - apiMethodDocs
      hasDebugEnv - has debug environment
      返回:
      List of Api

      build dubbo apis
      参数:
      apiMethodDocs - apiMethodDocs
      返回:
      List of Api

    • buildHerder

      public static List<HttpParam> buildHerder(List<ApiReqParam> apiReqParams)
      build request header
      参数:
      apiReqParams - Request header parameter list
      返回:
      List of HttpParam

    • buildParams

      public static List<HttpParam> buildParams(List<ApiParam> apiParams)
      build request response params
      参数:
      apiParams - Param list
      返回:
      List of HttpParam

    • buildDependencies

      public static String buildDependencies(List<RpcApiDependency> dependencies)
      Builds a string representation of the dependencies.

      This method takes a list of RpcApiDependency objects, converts each dependency to a string format, and concatenates them into a single string, with each dependency separated by a newline.

      参数:
      dependencies - A list of RpcApiDependency objects representing the dependencies.
      返回:
      A string containing all the dependencies formatted and concatenated.

    • buildErrorCode

      public static List<CommonErrorCode> buildErrorCode(ApiConfig config, com.thoughtworks.qdox.JavaProjectBuilder javaProjectBuilder)
      Builds a list of error codes.
      参数:
      config - the API configuration object containing error code information
      javaProjectBuilder - the Java project builder for accessing project resources
      返回:
      a list of CommonErrorCode objects representing all API error codes

    • buildTornaDic

      public static List<TornaDic> buildTornaDic(List<ApiDocDict> apiDocDicts)
      Builds a list of TornaDic objects from a list of ApiDocDict objects.

      This method is primarily used to transform the original list of ApiDocDict objects into a list of TornaDic objects suitable for frontend display. It sets the name and description of TornaDic objects and calls other methods to construct dropdown items.

      参数:
      apiDocDicts - The original list of ApiDocDict objects containing titles, descriptions, and data dictionaries.
      返回:
      A list of TornaDic objects representing the transformed data dictionaries.

    • setTornaArrayTags

      public static void setTornaArrayTags(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaMethod method, ApiMethodDoc apiMethodDoc, ApiConfig apiConfig)
      Set torna tags
      参数:
      method - method
      apiMethodDoc - apiMethodDoc
      apiConfig - apiConfig
